name: MoneyGram
description_short: Overland Park's MoneyGram at 9970 W 87th St offers check-cashing and money transfer services Monday through Saturday.
description_long:
MoneyGram is located at 9970 W 87th St in Overland Park, KS, in a standalone location convenient for west-side residents. This Overland Park location operates Monday through Friday from 8AM to 8PM, and Saturday from 9AM to 6PM, providing extended access to check-cashing and money transfer services. The store sits along a major commercial corridor in Overland Park.

At this Overland Park MoneyGram, you can send and receive domestic and international money transfers, cash checks from employers and government agencies, and pay bills. Call +1 913-901-8300 for current exchange rates, transfer limits, and service fees based on destination.

Bring a valid government-issued photo ID and recipient details for transfers. This Overland Park location is ideal if you need weekend access—Saturday hours start at 9AM. MoneyGram provides reliable, fast money movement for the local community.
pros: Massive network of 13,000+ locations across the United States provides exceptional geographic accessibility
Offers multiple service types (money transfer, check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill payment) in one company
Hybrid service model allows customers to choose online or in-person transactions based on preference
Easy location finder using map, address, city, state, or ZIP code search functionality
Operates in underserved areas where traditional banking options are limited
Same-day money transfer and cash access capabilities at most locations
No requirement for bank account to use core services
cons: Money transfer and check cashing services typically carry fees that reduce net funds received or cashed
Service quality and fee structures vary by individual location due to third-party operator network
Limited information available on website regarding specific fee schedules and service terms
Physical location dependency means less convenience for rural or remote areas despite large network
No credit-building benefits or financial products for consumers seeking to establish credit history
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without traditional bank accounts needing check cashing services
People sending money to family and friends domestically who prefer in-person transactions
Consumers in rural or underserved communities with limited banking infrastructure
Individuals needing quick bill payment or money order services without a bank relationship
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those without regular bank access who need reliable check cashing, money orders, or domestic money transfer services. The main caveat is that fees on money transfers and check cashing reduce net proceeds, and customers should compare costs against bank alternatives before using MoneyGram for routine transactions.
services: Domestic money transfers and money sending nationwide
Money receiving services across 13,000+ U.S. locations
In-person transaction services at physical locations
Location finder and branch locator services
Cash pickup services for received transfers
meta_description: Overland Park, KS MoneyGram at 9970 W 87th St - check-cashing & money transfers. Mon-Fri 8AM-8PM, Sat 9AM-6PM.
